mapper.sql: select id, source_module, source_id, file_name, file_type, file_url, file_size, download_count, last_download_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag from tdw_download_record
mapper.insert: insert into tdw_download_record(source_module, source_id, file_name, file_type, file_url, file_size, download_count, last_download_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark, del_flag) values(#{sourceModule}, #{sourceId}, #{fileName}, #{fileType}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileSize}, #{downloadCount}, #{lastDownloadTime}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{updateBy}, #{updateTime}, #{remark}, #{delFlag})
mapper.update: update tdw_download_record set download_count = ifnull(download_count, 0) + 1, last_download_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
update tdw_download_record set del_flag = '2', update_time = now() where id in
#{id}
